name: open-academic-paper-machine
description: Open Academic Paper Machine — Autonomous academic paper production system. Uses MCP academic-search tools (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, arXiv) for literature search, snowballing, and export. PaperBanana MCP for AI figure generation based on Zhu et al. (2026, arXiv:2601.23265). 14 skill engines (literature, theory, method, writing, figure, verification, LaTeX, review + screening, peer review, positioning, submission, presentation, co-author) with fill-in-the-blank templates. 15 slash commands including /write-paper for the full 8-phase pipeline, /review-paper for simulated peer review, /screen-papers for SLR screening, /prepare-submission for venue-specific submission, /analyze-positioning, /analyze-writing, /monitor-literature, and /generate-slides.

args: if [ -f "$PWD/.env" ]; then set -a; . "$PWD/.env"; set +a; fi; exec paperbanana-mcp
